pages.name: Ant Design
topLevelNames: This is an open source project，CC BY 4.0 licenced, welcome to visit the original file we’re working on and comment any thoughts or suggestions
If you want to join us and help contribute，please leave your Twitter or Wechat ID in the comments

Once you visited the original file you can go to any project of yours and you should see this library under your libraries modal, turn the switch on and you’re good to go. These components are regularly updated, and yours will too :) and that is the power of open source, hope you enjoy! (We’ll do our best to ensure backward compatibility, so don’t worry it won’t break your work.)
Build from the ground up by my collegue YingMing, if you want live updates, visit the original file

Another greate library build by my colleague YingMing, taking full advantage of autolayout v.3 and variants, if you want to use the live version, visit the original file, and this library should appear under your libraries panel, tips on how to effectively use this library is included Quickly build the landing you want to further increase your productivity.

Ant Design HiTu aims to modularize layout, color, shapes, and a series of design guidelines to help designers fulfill illustration requests gracefully and fast. This project is currently in early alpha, loads of more feature such as figure skeleton system, custom outfits and global color styles is in the making. If you want live updates, visit the original file and turn on the switch in your library.

pages.name: Page 1
topLevelNames: Why to use the big image at the first place? User do not know the merchant (infamous one) and cannot understand what services provided at one glance. Image help user to identify the provider category, available services.

pages.name: Bills
topLevelNames: 1. Approved credit limit (a revolving loan) 2. Interest rate 3. A link to an example of repayment schedule (up to 6 month instalment) 4. A link to the loan agreement and T&C 5. A link to a minimum product disclosure product disclosure page must contain at least the following: - name of product issuer - product name - interest rate - all applicable fees - cautions: fees may be applied for xx cases, interest rate maybe increased if xx - billing and cycle - how to send a repayment receipt - any important notification / reminder 6. A link to a loan page

pages.name: 🎇 overview
topLevelNames: This space will be the space for your storytelling. At any point of time, whoever come in to the doc should be able to understand the project scole, goals, current status and artifacts (design WIP), by reading this page. This space will also be the main space collaborate with PM, UI designers, and other stakeholders. Anyone can give feedback and ask questions using comment. The communication happened here will be recoreded int he comments. This deck will evolve from scope alignment doc to UX presentation deck, to completed UXUI deliverable doc.

pages.name: 🔍 Research
topLevelNames: Main editor of this page is UX designer. Anyone can contribute, PM, UI, Researcher. All research done, notes, competitor references, design moodboards, etc. Everything that’s needed to design this feature. Include research highlights into UX deck if it helps you tell the story.

pages.name: ▶️ Prototype(optional)
topLevelNames: use instance of the screen symbol to create prototype. happy flow first, other flows see if needed include the happy flow prototype link in UX deck

pages.name: Page 1
topLevelNames: 如果对方系统本身有padding值，应该如何处理？ 我们logo本身对外是否有padding、margin规定？
If the other system itself has padding values, how should it be handled?
Does our logo itself have any specified padding or margin rules?
如果对方预留的区域，与我们logo比例不一致，需要如何处理？
If the area reserved by the other party does not match the proportions of our logo, how should it be handled?
"Enlarge the content and crop the excess parts" or "Display all, leaving blank space at the top and bottom or on the sides"?
放大内容，超出部分裁剪
Enlarge the content and crop the excess parts
显示全部，上下或者左右留白。
Display all, leaving blank space at the top and bottom or on the sides
这三种logo，应该如何区分应用场景，或者说我们应该在什么条件下使用哪种logo？
有没有具体的规范文档，来说明这些使用场景
类似这种powered by +logo的形式，logo应该如何摆放？在水平线上？还是垂直居中？
How should we differentiate the application scenarios for these three types of logos, or in other words, under what conditions should we use which type of logo?
